name: Clio Aite
description:
Clio Aite (クリオ•アイティー) is an Irish-Australian female VTuber. A former medievalist professor, Clio loves playing grand strategy games such as Europa Universalis IV, Total War: Warhammer III and various other games. She is very proud of her hagdom, and is known for her mental endurance, often streaming for 8 to 12 hours daily.

She is most closely associated with her fellow Australian VTubers Jean Faymas, Mako Fukasame, and Hanya in the Australian VTuber Collective, Vershion. In 2025, Clio became a member of Phase-Connect, debuting as part of Invaders QUEST alongside Mari Mari and Eepy Sleepy.
